message:
feat(core): add e-process drift detector bridge methods and convenience API (ft-2p9cb.4.2.2)

observe_batch, observe_latency_us, running_stddev, z_score, alarm_rate,
is_alarming, set_lambda, set_null_mean, set_alpha, warning_count,
peak_e_value. 13 unit tests (504 total).
